title: Never gonna Stop Loving You
lyrics: You may tell me to go, you may tell me to walk out the door baby, tell me you hate me, you may tell me I'm crazy, but that won't keep me from loving every move you make, from loving the way your legs shake, and everything about you baby, I ain't gonna, I ain't gonna I tell you where to go, handcuff nothing, maybe I'll watch from the sides, but nothing can tell me I'm gonna run away, nothing can tell me I can find a way, if you just see me in a new light, here comes a round full circle and I know that I'm never gonna stop loving you, I'm never gonna stop loving you, even if I'm not around, even if I never hear your voice again girl, yeah I'm never gonna stop, never gonna stop loving you, and everything you do, I'm never gonna stop loving you, till the end of time, I'm never gonna stop loving you, until the end of my night, till I can't hear, I can't see, I'm never gonna stop loving you, never gonna stop thinking of all you've been, no we couldn't, no we still couldn't, it doesn't matter no, never gonna stop loving you, never ever ever ever gonna stop loving you, and everything you do, never gonna stop loving you, never gonna stop loving you. Thanks for watching! Please subscribe!
